data.title: Infratil’s CDC Valuation Rises Amid Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

An announcement from Infratil Limited ( (IFUUF) ) is now available.

Infratil Limited’s recent independent valuation of its investment in CDC shows a significant increase of A$148 million over three months, attributed to the completion of a transaction that raised its stake in CDC to 49.76%. Despite a slight decline in CDC’s overall equity valuation, the company’s investment value has grown, reflecting its robust construction and operational expansion, particularly in Melbourne and Canberra. The valuation methodology shifted to a Discounted Cash Flow approach, with the cost of equity remaining stable. Infratil plans to invest an additional A$250 million in the next year to support CDC’s development pipeline, indicating continued commitment to growth and expansion.

More about Infratil Limited

Infratil Limited is a New Zealand-based infrastructure investment company that focuses on sectors such as energy, transport, data centers, and social infrastructure. The company is known for its strategic investments in critical infrastructure assets, aiming to deliver sustainable returns to its stakeholders.

Learn more about IFUUF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Noah Holdings Ltd. Class A ( (HK:6686) ).

Noah Holdings Ltd. announced the distribution of a final dividend and a special dividend for the year ended December 31, 2024. The dividends will be paid in both Hong Kong dollars and U.S. dollars, depending on the shareholders’ registration location, with the distribution expected to occur in late July 2025. This move reflects the company’s strong financial performance and commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

More about Noah Holdings Ltd. Class A

Noah Holdings Ltd. is a private wealth and asset management company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating as Noah Holdings Private Wealth and Asset Management Limited in Hong Kong. The company is listed on the NYSE and HKEX, focusing on providing financial services and investment management solutions.

data.title: enCore Energy Amends Uranium Loan Agreement with Boss Energy
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

enCore Energy ( (TSE:EU) ) has issued an announcement.

On June 27, 2025, enCore Energy Corp.’s subsidiary and Boss Energy Limited amended their Uranium Loan Agreement to extend the repayment date to July 3, 2025, and subsequently to December 27, 2025. This amendment also introduced a $3.6 million cash facility to fund capital contributions to their joint venture. The agreement, initially for 200,000 pounds of uranium valued at $20.1 million, now has $10.4 million outstanding. The interest rate was increased to 10% per annum, and additional terms were included to secure the agreement and address potential defaults.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:EU) stock is a Hold with a C$7.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on enCore Energy stock, see the TSE:EU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:EU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:EU is a Neutral.

The overall score reflects strong technical momentum and positive corporate developments, offset by significant financial and valuation challenges. The company’s revenue growth and strategic initiatives are promising, but profitability concerns and a lack of dividend yield weigh heavily on the stock’s attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:EU stock, click here.

More about enCore Energy

enCore Energy Corp. operates in the energy sector, focusing on uranium production and recovery. The company is involved in joint ventures and projects such as the Alta Mesa In Situ Recovery Uranium Project and Central Processing Plant in South Texas.

Average Trading Volume: 276,225

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$724.6M

The latest announcement is out from Web3 Ventures Inc ( (TSE:CLDV) ).

Cloud3 Ventures Inc. has announced a corporate update and is preparing for the first tranche closing of its $0.30 financing round. The company is focused on AI, blockchain, and clean energy, holding over 120 million $LIF3 tokens and a diverse portfolio of digital assets. The financing round, supported by its founding shareholder Orthogonal Thinker, will fund additional Bitcoin and $LIF3 token acquisitions and further infrastructure development. This move is part of Cloud3’s strategy to deepen its focus on decentralized systems and intelligent energy platforms, with the company also preparing for its fiscal year-end and ensuring compliance with financial reporting requirements.

Packaging ( (PKG) ) has issued an update.

On June 30, 2025, Packaging Corporation of America entered into a definitive agreement to acquire the containerboard business of Greif, Inc. for $1.8 billion in cash. This acquisition, expected to close in the third quarter of 2025, is subject to customary conditions and regulatory approvals, and includes provisions for termination rights and indemnification, potentially impacting PCA’s market positioning and operational capabilities.

data.title: Silo Pharma Faces Nasdaq Non-Compliance Notice
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Silo Pharma ( (SILO) ) has provided an announcement.

On June 27, 2025, Silo Pharma, Inc. received a notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market indicating non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), due to the company’s stock price falling below this threshold from May 14, 2025, to June 26, 2025. The notification does not immediately affect the trading of Silo Pharma’s stock, but the company has until December 24, 2025, to regain compliance. If necessary, Silo Pharma may consider implementing a reverse stock split to meet the requirement, and failure to comply could result in delisting, with an opportunity to appeal.

More about Silo Pharma

Average Trading Volume: 978,898

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $4.43M

Lithium Energi Exploration ( (TSE:LEXI) ) has shared an announcement.

Lithium Energi Exploration Inc. has announced that Arena Investors LP now holds full title and interest in Lithium Energi Argentina S.A. shares, following the lapse of the objection period to the foreclosure. This development comes as the company faces challenges, including the cessation of active business operations and the resignation of a key director, Dr. Gerardo Romero Aguero. The company’s current situation may impact its market positioning and stakeholders, given its missed reporting deadlines and lack of resources.

Spark’s Take on TSE:LEXI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:LEXI is a Underperform.

Lithium Energi Exploration’s stock is significantly hampered by financial instability with zero revenue and persistent losses. Despite some recent improvements in balance sheet and cash flow, the bearish technical indicators and poor valuation metrics underscore a challenging outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:LEXI stock, click here.

More about Lithium Energi Exploration

Lithium Energi Exploration, Inc. is an exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of lithium brine assets in Argentina. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, with offices in Catamarca, Argentina, the company’s shares are listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, the Frankfurt Exchange, and the U.S. OTC markets.
